---
title: "A Decision-Centred Modelling Environment"
---

# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This is the online companion to:

**A Decision-Centred Modelling Environment for Long-Horizon Planning 
Under Deep Uncertainty: Foundations, Architecture, and Application 
to Industrial Process Heat Decarbonisation**

*Seyed Ahmad Mahmoudi Lahijani — Auckland University of Technology — 2026*

---

## The Core Finding {.unnumbered}

> When the Edendale electrification pathway is evaluated against a 
> structured ensemble of 64 futures, **23 of those futures** produce 
> grid hosting capacity exceedances that generate regional 
> infrastructure costs invisible from within the site boundary alone.
>
> This result — 36 percent of the ensemble revealing a constraint 
> that site-level analysis cannot see — is the gap this framework 
> fills, made analytically visible.

---

## The Central Commitment {.unnumbered}

> *The decision makes the boundary; the artefact makes the connection.*

---

## Quick Navigation {.unnumbered}

| If you want to... | Go to... |
|---|---|
| Understand the framework's big picture | [Context Declaration](front-matter/context-declaration.qmd) |
| Know how to read this document | [Navigation Guide](front-matter/navigation-guide.qmd) |
| Start the conceptual argument | [Module 0: Orientation](manuscript/module-0-orientation.qmd) |
| See what has been built | [Module 6: The Proof of Concept](manuscript/module-6-poc.qmd) |
| Contribute an extension | [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md) |

---

::: {.callout-note}
## For AI Assistants

Upload this document to your preferred AI assistant to ask 
framework-specific questions. The Context Declaration contains 
key concept definitions and audience-specific question catalogues 
designed for AI-assisted engagement.
:::

---

## Current Development Status {.unnumbered}

| Component | Status |
|---|---|
| Front Matter (Context Declaration, Preamble, Navigation Guide) | ✓ Complete |
| Module 0: Orientation | ○ In progress |
| Module 1: Foundations | ○ In progress |
| Modules 2–7 | ○ Scaffolded, content being added |
| Proof of Concept (Edendale–Southland) | ✓ Implemented |
